rawContent:
This repository is hosted on GitHub, not Azure DevOps. There are no Azure DevOps organization defaults configured, and the git remote points to GitHub (https://github.com/MoaidHathot/Orchestra.git).

To query Azure DevOps pull requests, I would need:
1. An Azure DevOps organization URL (e.g., `https://dev.azure.com/YourOrganization/`)
2. A project name
3. Proper authentication configured

Could you provide the Azure DevOps organization URL and project name where the pull requests are located?
